serverInfo.name: signet
serverInfo.title: Signet — Personal Sovereign Agent Stack
serverInfo.description: Signet is an MCP server for cryptographic vault operations and deterministic policy enforcement. The engine (signet, v0.2.1) implements the vault, ZK proof, credential, and steward-negotiation surfaces. The policy-hook companion (signet-eval, v3.9.0) exposes the management toolset catalogued here — every AI-agent tool call is evaluated against user-owned rules before execution.
serverInfo.author: Jeremy McEntire <jmc@cageandmirror.com>

install.claude_code: claude mcp add --scope user --transport stdio signet -- signet-eval serve

tools.name: signet_list_rules
tools.description: List all current policy rules. Shows what's blocked, allowed, or requires confirmation.

tools.name: signet_add_rule
tools.description: Add a policy rule. Action: ALLOW, DENY, ASK, GATE, or ENSURE.

tools.name: signet_remove_rule
tools.description: Remove a policy rule by name.

tools.name: signet_edit_rule
tools.description: Edit an existing rule's properties.

tools.name: signet_reorder_rule
tools.description: Move a rule to a new position (1-based). Critical since first-match-wins.

tools.name: signet_set_limit
tools.description: Set a spending limit for a category.

tools.name: signet_sign_policy
tools.description: Sign the policy file with HMAC for tamper detection.

tools.name: signet_validate
tools.description: Validate the current policy file. Shows errors with actionable fix hints. Pass fix=true to auto-fix (removes broken rules, clamps out-of-range values). Locked rules are never modified.

tools.name: signet_test
tools.description: Test a tool call against the current policy without executing it.

tools.name: signet_condition_help
tools.description: Show all available condition functions with descriptions and examples.

tools.name: signet_status
tools.description: Show vault status, spending totals, credential count.

tools.name: signet_recent_actions
tools.description: Show recent action log.

tools.name: signet_reset_session
tools.description: Reset session spending counters.

tools.name: signet_store_credential
tools.description: Store a Tier 3 credential (compartment-encrypted).

tools.name: signet_list_credentials
tools.description: List credential names (not values).

tools.name: signet_delete_credential
tools.description: Delete a credential from the vault.

tools.name: signet_use_credential
tools.description: Request a credential through the policy-gated capability system. Enforces domain, purpose, amount, and one-time constraints.

tools.name: signet_preflight_submit
tools.description: File a preflight: declare task intent, risks, and self-imposed constraints before starting work. Constraints are HMAC-signed and locked for the specified duration.

tools.name: signet_preflight_test
tools.description: Dry-run: validate preflight constraints without submitting.

tools.name: signet_preflight_active
tools.description: View your active preflight: task, constraints, lockout status, violation count.

tools.name: signet_preflight_history
tools.description: View past preflights and their outcomes.

tools.name: signet_preflight_violations
tools.description: View constraint violations for the active or a specified preflight.
